_note: Canonical registry of finding category codes. Source of truth for scoring.md, output-format.md, and all review agents. When adding a new category, update this registry first.

PERF.description: Backend performance issue (N+1, O(n^2), blocking I/O)

FE-PERF.description: Frontend performance issue (re-renders, bundle size, DOM)

TEST.description: Test quality issue (coverage, mocks, assertions, isolation)

DOC.description: Documentation gap (missing docs, stale sections, cross-ref conflicts)

QUAL.description: Code quality (complexity, duplication, dead code, error handling)

SCOUT.description: Boy Scout improvement (tracked, no point deduction)

A11Y.description: Accessibility violation (WCAG, keyboard nav, screen reader, ARIA)

STRUCT.description: Project structure violation (file placement, naming, boundaries)

REVIEW-GAP.description: Coverage gap from timed-out or failed review agent

DESIGN-TOKEN.description: Frontend design token violation (hardcoded hex/rgb instead of theme tokens)

DESIGN-MOTION.description: Frontend animation performance issue (non-GPU properties, missing will-change)
